name: Mary Osborne
abstract: Mary Osborne (July 17, 1921 – March 4, 1992) was an American jazz guitarist. She began performing at a young age and was featured on a radio program in North Dakota, where she grew up.

concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: Women Blow Their Own Horns

about_quotes.speaker: Gordon Lorraine
about_quotes.evidence: I got her to come in. It was so touching. And she died shortly after that, but while she was there it was a great experience for me.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gordon Lorraine — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: Mary McPartland, and Mary Osborne, they were over there a lot you know.

about_quotes.speaker: Terry Clark
about_quotes.evidence: They had Mary Osborne on guitar... But they had a great group.
about_quotes.doc_title: Terry Clark — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
